subject: New Assignment: Software Engineer – Healthcare
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

Carevault (healthcare) is looking for a senior Software Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:

  • Start: 2023-01-19
  • Duration: 3 months
  • Location: Stockholm (on-site)
  • Rate: up to 950 SEK/h

Required tech:

  • TypeScript
  • Kubernetes
  • MongoDB

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Alicia Strand
Talent Scout
ByteForce
Tel: +46 70 788 90 12
